---
agent: agent
---
Use the instructions in [cypressTest.instructions.md](../instructions/cypressTest.instructions.md) to guide your implementation. Execute the created or updated test file to ensure all tests pass successfully or iterate until they do.

If the User didn't specify a test case in the prompt, ask him for more details about what to test.

Create or update a Cypress test file located in the appropriate directory structure under `../../cypress/e2e/` for the provided test case.
